name: The Easiest Crockpot Roast
recipeInstructions: The easiest and best roast beef/crockpot recipe I know of. Place one large roast (any kind except rump) in the crockpot before bed and sprinkle one package of au jus gravy mix over it. Cover and set on low for 8 hours or more. In the morning, add 1 cup water and continue cooking. If you prefer vegetables, add them early in the afternoon. By dinner time, you'll have the tenderest roast beef with delicious drippings for leftovers!
